name: agent-cold-email
description: Agent-controlled cold-outreach infrastructure, live in production. One bearer token and 21 focused tools replace multiple vendor accounts, preserve durable infrastructure state, provision isolated domains and mailboxes, run sequences, manage replies and push webhooks, and enforce guardrails server-side. The customer's own agent remains the strategy and content layer. Free sandbox demo today, no card, no waitlist; real sending runs in production (Gmail API, HTTPS/443), with new accounts activating via a short concierge step while self-serve activation rolls out. Pricing starts at $99/month for 5 provisioned mailboxes, then $10/month per additional mailbox, with no send quota (sends are not the billing meter).

auth.description: One token per tenant, obtained via POST https://agent-cold-email-api.yaakovscher.workers.dev/signup (no auth required for signup itself). Pass as Authorization: Bearer <token>.

statusNote: Live in production: the hosted API, MCP endpoint, npm CLI, isolated sandbox, and real sending (Gmail API, HTTPS/443) are all live. New accounts activate real sending through a short concierge step while self-serve activation and live billing finish rolling out. Demo/sandbox tenants remain structurally unable to reach vendor adapters and incur no real spend.

pricing.model: Starts at $99/month for 5 provisioned mailboxes, then $10/month per additional mailbox (a $49 platform fee + $10/mailbox, 5-mailbox minimum; ladder runs 5-60 mailboxes). No send quota — sends are not the billing meter. Self-serve live billing is rolling out; paid activation today runs through a short concierge step.
pricing.freeTier: Free sandboxed demo, no signup, no card, no waitlist: POST /signup or `npx agent-cold-email demo`.

tools.name: setup_infrastructure
tools.description: Buy branded lookalike domains, provision mailboxes, start warmup.

tools.name: infrastructure_status
tools.description: Provisioning + warmup progress, per-mailbox health, send-readiness date.

tools.name: launch_campaign
tools.description: Create and activate a sequence against a lead list.

tools.name: campaign_results
tools.description: Per-campaign sends, replies, bounces, complaints.

tools.name: metrics
tools.description: Account-wide deliverability + warmup health.

tools.name: inbox
tools.description: Unified reply inbox across all mailboxes.

tools.name: thread
tools.description: Full message history for one thread.

tools.name: reply
tools.description: Send a reply on a thread; stop-on-reply is automatic.

tools.name: mark
tools.description: Mark a thread read, unread, or archived.

tools.name: pause
tools.description: Pause one campaign.

tools.name: pause_all
tools.description: Pause every campaign for the tenant.

tools.name: account
tools.description: Usage, billing state, quota, and what the AI deliverability control loop has done.

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: List every saved dashboard view, or fetch one view's full layout + rev.

tools.name: configure_dashboard
tools.description: Create, update, promote-to-default, or delete a dashboard saved view.

tools.name: label_thread
tools.description: Set or clear a triage label on an inbox thread.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List every campaign with id, name, status, and event counts.

tools.name: activity
tools.description: Pollable, chronological feed of campaign events and deliverability control-loop actions.

tools.name: get_webhooks
tools.description: List outbound webhook subscriptions, or fetch one subscription plus its recent delivery and attempt log.

tools.name: configure_webhook
tools.description: Create, update, or delete an outbound webhook subscription. Push reply, bounce, soft_bounce, and complaint events to your own HTTPS endpoint, HMAC-SHA256 signed, as an alternative to polling activity.

tools.name: get_byo_domains
tools.description: List your BYO (bring-your-own) domains, or fetch one domain's full intake detail, pre-flight scan results, and consent state.

tools.name: configure_byo_domain
tools.description: Register or advance a bring-your-own domain/mailbox intake: pre-flight scan, consent tracking, and activation handoff for sending from a domain you already own.

guardrails: suppression list + full RFC 8058 one-click unsubscribe (List-Unsubscribe/List-Unsubscribe-Post headers plus the hosted one-click endpoint), honored immediately on every applicable message
lookalike-domain generation scoped to the customer's own brand only
